title: crocanthemum suffrutescens
intro: Crocanthemum suffrutescens, also known as dwarf heterotheca, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Crocanthemum suffrutescens include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves that can be used topically or taken internally.
